description_long: This is a large, modern luxury house with a flat roof and multiple interconnected rectangular volumes. The property features a spacious outdoor area with a swimming pool, a circular hot tub, and a patio with lounge furniture. There is a prominent driveway leading to a three-car garage, and landscaped elements such as trimmed bushes and a small garden near the entrance. The house has large windows arranged in vertical strips, providing ample natural light to the interior. A helipad and a small outbuilding are visible on the property, indicating high-end amenities. The overall color palette is neutral, with beige walls, white accents, and dark roofing elements.
description: A modern, multi-story luxury house with a flat roof, large windows, a pool, and a three-car garage, set on a landscaped lot with a helipad and outbuilding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, swimming pool, hot tub, and patio area with outdoor furniture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, hot tub, outbuilding, and the full extent of the landscaped yard.
description_view_2: Driveway and garage view, showing the main entryway, three parked cars, and landscaped front garden.
description_view_3: Rear and side view displaying the interconnected building volumes, helipad, and the relationship between the house and outdoor amenities.
attribute_window_arrangement: vertical strips and large panels, asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide, flat walkway, minimal steps, and a large modern door flanked by windows and landscaped elements.
